ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR( AND(ISCHANGED(Third_Proposal_Date__c ),Third_Proposal_Date__c > TODAY()),
AND(OR(ISCHANGED(Second_Proposal_Date__c),ISCHANGED(Third_Proposal_Date__c )), Second_Proposal_Date__c >= Third_Proposal_Date__c),
AND(OR(ISCHANGED(Initial_Proposal_Date__c),ISCHANGED(Third_Proposal_Date__c )), Initial_Proposal_Date__c>= Third_Proposal_Date__c )
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Third Proposal Date cannot be in future and should be greater than Initial Proposal Date and Second Proposal Date
